project.component:
{ "keyToString": { "Android App.app.executor": "Run", "ModuleVcsDetector.initialDetectionPerformed": "true", "PROJECT_TRUSTED_KEY": "true", "ResourceManagerPrefKey.ResourceType": "LAYOUT", "RunOnceActivity.ShowReadmeOnStart": "true", "RunOnceActivity.cidr.known.project.marker": "true", "RunOnceActivity.git.unshallow": "true", "RunOnceActivity.readMode.enableVisualFormatting": "true", "cf.first.check.clang-format": "false", "cidr.known.project.marker": "true", "git-widget-placeholder": "new__branch", "kotlin-language-version-configured": "true", "last_opened_file_path": "/home/ryan/AndroidStudioProjects/OpenPoly/RecipeApp/app/src/main/res/drawable", "project.structure.last.edited": "Variables", "project.structure.proportion": "0.17", "project.structure.side.proportion": "0.19640565", "settings.editor.selected.configurable": "experimental" }, "keyToStringList": { "com.android.tools.idea.sqlite.queryhistory": [ "SELECT DISTINCT recipes.* FROM recipes
INNER JOIN Favourite ON recipes.recipeID = Favourite.recipeID 
WHERE Favourite.recipeID = '%1%' ", "SELECT DISTINCT recipes.* FROM recipes
LEFT JOIN Favourite ON recipes.recipeID = Favourite.recipeID 
WHERE Favourite.userName = '%milk%' 
OR recipes.recipeDescription LIKE '%milk%' 
OR recipes.recipeIngredients LIKE '%milk%'
", "SELECT DISTINCT recipes.* FROM recipes
LEFT JOIN Favourite ON recipes.recipeID = Favourite.recipeID 
WHERE Favourite.recipeID = '%1%' ", "SELECT * from recipes WHERE recipeIngredients LIKE '%milk%' ", "SELECT * from recipes" ] } }
